decisions.title: Foundation checkpoint refs are fixed for the current lossless-ready baseline
decisions.summary: Use tag `foundation-lossless-ready-2026-04-15` and branch `backup/foundation-lossless-ready-2026-04-15` as the explicit backup refs for the current foundation checkpoint.

decisions.title: Current system status is lossless-ready, not fully auto-lossless-proven
decisions.summary: AI-Project-Manager is the governance/control plane; the OpenClaw-to-OpenMemory bridge seam is live; new-chat recovery, power-loss-safe recovery, quarantine-safe retrieval, and repo-local ledger rotation logic are proven; live Cursor afterFileEdit hook delivery remains the only open proof gap.

decisions.title: mem0-bridge is now the allowed OpenMemory compatibility seam
decisions.summary: The bridge keeps the `mem0-bridge` name for continuity but now documents retrieve-before-plan and store-after-gate against the flat Cursor OpenMemory runtime.

decisions.title: Lossless bridge proof is partial until the AI-PM ledger hook fires live
decisions.summary: Do not call the tri-workspace fully lossless-proven while the normal AI-PM ledger append can still fail to rotate/archive under policy.

patterns.title: Canonical PLAN bootstrap stack
patterns.summary: Recover in this order: charter, repo authority contract, `docs/tooling/MCP_CANONICAL_CONFIG.md`, targeted OpenMemory, AI-PM recovery bundle, `STATE.md` summary/current state, then exactly one of `DECISIONS.md`, `PATTERNS.md`, or `HANDOFF.md` only if needed.

patterns.title: Canonical ledger compaction fallback
patterns.summary: Until live Cursor afterFileEdit delivery is re-proven, use `python .cursor/hooks/rotate_ledger.py --force` after ledger appends when compaction is needed.

patterns.title: Bridge promotion loop
patterns.summary: Search memory first, validate the packet, add one compact self-identifying memory, immediately re-search for discoverability, then mirror the proof into recovery/state docs.

patterns.title: Clean-room recovery proof
patterns.summary: A fresh verifier can recover objective, last action, blockers, and bridge status from charter + repo authority + one targeted OpenMemory search + AI-PM recovery bundle + STATE summary, without HANDOFF or ledger default reads.
